top_signals.title: Webinar: How attackers bypass MFA and how defenders can respond
top_signals.summary: Modern phishing attacks, including Device Code phishing, can undermine MFA protections and grant attackers access to corporate accounts without stealing passwords. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help security teams detect compromised accounts faster and automate response workflows. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
